positive: Synthwave aesthetic illustration featuring a chrome grid landscape at sunset. Two stylized palm trees silhouetted against a vibrant neon pink, electric blue, and purple gradient sky. Retro 80s vaporwave art, geometric shapes, high contrast, dramatic lighting.
